questions.text: You are preparing for Google Cloud Digital Leader and reviewing Digital transformation with Google Cloud. Which source aligns with official Google Cloud documentation and exam guides?
questions.explanation: Use Cloud Digital Leader guide and other official materials listed in the exam guide—not copied exam items.
